tooltip.minesier.computer.1: Empty-hand right-click opens the JavaScript terminal.
tooltip.minesier.computer.2: Insert a Disk to save files; /startup.js boots automatically.
tooltip.minesier.computer.3: NIC faces use net.address(), net.send(), and net.receive().
tooltip.minesier.turtle.1: Programmable mobile computer; run turtle.forward() to start.
tooltip.minesier.turtle.2: Inventory shows 16 item slots plus a Disk slot.
tooltip.minesier.turtle.3: Equipment slots accept foot, arm, and top expansion parts.
tooltip.minesier.disk.1: Portable text filesystem for Computer and Turtle programs.
tooltip.minesier.disk.2: Use Save/Load in the terminal or fs.list/read/write/remove in JS.
tooltip.minesier.cable.1: Connects Computer, Turtle, Switch, and Modem network faces.
tooltip.minesier.cable.2: Each connected face is a NIC direction such as north or up.
tooltip.minesier.switch.2: Empty-hand right-click shows ports, counters, and MAC aging.
tooltip.minesier.wireless_modem.1: Place beside a NIC face to bridge frames wirelessly.
tooltip.minesier.wireless_modem.2: Computers and Turtles can send through the adjacent modem.
tooltip.minesier.monitor.1: Text display driven by an adjacent Computer.
tooltip.minesier.wheel_foot_part.1: Foot equipment: faster ground movement on normal terrain.
tooltip.minesier.hover_foot_part.1: Foot equipment: hover movement profile for Turtle travel.
tooltip.minesier.proximity_sensor_module: Top module: enables turtle.scan() environment sensing.
